subcodes.first_line: O Well-Beloved of My heart! The blessed and exalted missive hath reached this lowly one, bringing restoration to ruin and bestowing grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محبوب فوادی دستخط مبارک عالی باینفانی آن کرد که دست تعمیر بویرانی و عنایت
subcodes.subjects: @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @business; financial; property matters, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
